query:
SELECT 
  q.id, q.quotationNumber, q.quotationMode,
  qi.id as itemId, qi.productId, qi.productName, qi.productSku,
  qb.id as batchId, qb.variantId, qb.variantName, qb.quantity, qb.unitPrice
FROM quotations q
LEFT JOIN quotation_items qi ON q.id = qi.quotationId
LEFT JOIN quotation_batches qb ON qi.id = qb.quotationItemId
WHERE q.quotationNumber = 'QUO-20260216-005'
LIMIT 10;
